title: Being able to change the subject line in a reply email
excerpt:
Description
When replying to the email via desktop in the emails and activities; it does not allow you to remove the ‘RE:’, ‘RE:’, ‘RE’ in the subject line that Monday.com CRM automatically adds. The more replies, the mo…

posts.author: KaylaG123 (Kayla Germaniuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When replying to the email via desktop in the emails and activities; it does not allow you to remove the ‘RE:’, ‘RE:’, ‘RE’ in the subject line that Monday.com CRM automatically adds. The more replies, the more redundant endless ‘RE:’'s before you see the original subject line. Very frustrating and makes us look incompetent.

What are you trying to achieve

Allow us to edit the subject line when replying to an email. Or don’t add the ‘RE’ automatically

posts.author: murphyslcp (Seth Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml:
KaylaG123:

What are you trying to achieve

Allow us to edit the subject line when replying to an email. Or don’t add the ‘RE’ automatically

It would honestly be nice for both to go into effect! No more prepending “RE:” and allow us to make adjustments as needed, given there may be times in which the subject line provided is cluttered/irrelevant to the case.
